user.title: Shelly Cloud DIY
user.description: Enter your Shelly Cloud DIY API token to connect to Shelly Cloud.

data.local_gateway_url: Local Gateway URL (optional, for historical data)

consent.title: Grant Device Access
consent.description:
Click the link below to grant access to your Shelly devices:

**[Open Shelly Cloud Consent Page]({consent_url})**

You will be asked to log into your Shelly Cloud account and select which devices to share with Home Assistant.

After granting access, click **Submit** below to complete setup.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Shelly Cloud DIY
reconfigure.description:
Update your settings below.

**[Open Shelly Cloud Consent Page]({consent_url})**

data.local_gateway_url: Local Gateway URL (optional, for historical data)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Shelly Cloud API
error.invalid_gateway_url: Local gateway URL must be http(s) and not point at localhost

abort.already_configured: Shelly Cloud DIY is already configured

init.title: Shelly Cloud DIY Options
init.description:
**Add More Devices:**
[Open Shelly Cloud Consent Page]({consent_url})

**Update Settings:**
Leave API Token empty to keep current token.

data.integrator_token: API Token (leave empty to keep current)
data.local_gateway_url: Local Gateway URL (optional, for historical data)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Shelly Cloud API
error.invalid_gateway_url: Local gateway URL must be http(s) and not point at localhost

download_and_convert_history.name: Download and Convert History
download_and_convert_history.description: Downloads Shelly EM historical data from local gateway and converts to CSV format for import via homeassistant-statistics.

gateway_url.name: Gateway URL
gateway_url.description: Base URL of local gateway (overrides configured URL)

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: Optional: Specific device ID to convert (all EM devices if empty)
